title: bonnaya reptans
intro: Bonnaya reptans, also known as Spermacoce or False Bugle, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Bonnaya reptans include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-cancer and anti-bacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Bonnaya reptans is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including skin conditions and wounds.
